data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. LUNA BAY never fired last start when finishing 10th of 16 in a Group 3 event at Randwick when sent out at odds of $201. Racing in a much easier line-up here looks ideally placed to return to winning form. 7. CALIFORNIA GRASS did well to place second of seven at long odds over 2000m at Rosehill last start after coming from last into the turn. She jumps from the inside draw and will be well fancied to take this race out. 9. GRANDINI has each-way claims following a last start second of seven over 2100m at Gosford last time out after coming from last into the turn. 3. DOLCE DIOR is backing up 10 days after finishing third over 2000m at Rosehill. Strong run last time and is capable of taking this out.","runners":[8,7,9,3],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: WYONG-R8-Fav Out
